title: Word Frequency Counter
description: Build a program that reads text and counts the frequency of each word, then displays the top N most common words.
requirements: Read text from a string (simulate file input)
Split into words, normalize to lowercase
hints: Use split_whitespace() to split text into words
HashMap::entry().or_insert(0) is the idiomatic way to count
Collect HashMap into a Vec of tuples for sorting
bonusChallenge: Handle punctuation (strip commas, periods). Support reading from stdin.
